Email Templates

Complete email sequences for pre-launch and launch campaigns, including VIP, B2B, and B2C segments with scheduling data

Email Templates

This document contains all email sequences for the HeyZack Kickstarter campaign, organized by phase and audience segment.

Voice Guidelines: See Brand Voice & Tone for messaging calibration by segment.

Pre-Launch Email Sequence

Campaign Timeline: T-7 days to Launch
Launch Date: February 15, 2026 at 9:00 AM PT

Segmentation Strategy

SegmentDescriptionSizeEarly Access
VIP B2CEarly supporters, beta testers, referrals~8008:00 AM PT (1 hour early)
VIP B2BProperty managers, hospitality operators~4008:00 AM PT (1 hour early)
Main B2CGeneral interest signups, waitlist~1,6009:00 AM PT (public launch)

Email 1: Launch Announcement (T-7 Days)

Send Date: February 8, 2026 at 8:00 AM PT

Email 1A: VIP List (B2C Focus)

ElementContent
FromAlex Chen at HeyZack
Subject AWe’re launching February 15th (VIP early access for you)
Subject BYou’re getting first access to HeyZack next week
PreheaderOne hour before everyone else + 40% early bird discount

Body:

Hey [First Name],

I’m writing to you first because you’ve been following our journey, and you deserve to know before anyone else:

HeyZack launches on Kickstarter February 15th at 9:00 AM PT.

But here’s what matters to you: As a VIP, you get access one hour early (8:00 AM PT) to secure the best early bird pricing before it’s gone.

What You’ll Get Access To:

✓ Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (40% off retail $1,332)
✓ Limited to first 500 backers — after that, price increases
✓ First shipments in June 2026 (VIPs ship first)
✓ One app controls everything — cameras, locks, climate, lighting
✓ No monthly fees for core features
✓ 30-minute setup (we’ve timed it)

Tyler (our beta tester from Seattle) said it best: “I’ve rebuilt my smart home three times in five years. HeyZack is the first system that actually just works. My wife uses it daily without asking me for help—that’s how I know it’s good.”

👉 See Your VIP Preview

Set your alarm for February 15th, 8:00 AM PT (that’s your VIP hour).

— Alex Chen
CEO & Co-Founder, HeyZack

P.S. — Forward this to anyone who’s complained about their smart home. They’ll thank you when their house actually works.

CTA Button: Preview the Campaign

Email 1B: VIP List (B2B Focus)

ElementContent
FromAlex Chen at HeyZack
Subject AHeyZack launches Feb 15th (Early operator access)
Subject BPortfolio-scale automation—launching next week
PreheaderCommercial beta program + 60% early adopter discount

Body:

Hey [First Name],

Quick update for property operators who’ve been following our development:

HeyZack launches on Kickstarter February 15th at 9:00 AM PT.

Your early operator access goes live one hour before public launch (8:00 AM PT).

Commercial Beta Program (Limited to 200 Operators):

Essential Tier: $4,999/property (60% off $8,000 retail)

  • Portfolio dashboard (unlimited properties)
  • AI energy optimization (20-30% savings documented)
  • Tenant/guest automation (check-in, climate, access)
  • DIY deployment (2 hours per property avg.)
  • Zero service contracts

What We’re Proving:

Patricia (property manager, 28-building portfolio in Austin) deployed HeyZack across 12 properties in Q4 2025:

  • Energy costs down 28% in Q1 = $47K saved
  • Tenant comfort complaints down 65%
  • Deployment cost: $5K per building vs. $85K quotes from Honeywell
  • ROI: 6 months

👉 View Operator Preview

Fair warning: We’re capping the commercial beta at 200 operators. With 400+ operators on our waitlist, first-come basis applies.

— Alex Chen
CEO & Co-Founder, HeyZack

P.S. — If you’re evaluating BMS vendors right now, see the preview before you sign any contracts.

CTA Button: View Operator Preview

Email 1C: Main List (B2C Focus)

ElementContent
FromAlex Chen at HeyZack
Subject AHeyZack launches February 15th
Subject BThe smart home that finally just works—launching next week
PreheaderOne app for everything. No monthly fees. 30-minute setup.

Body:

Hey [First Name],

Remember signing up because you were tired of juggling seven different apps just to control your smart home?

HeyZack launches February 15th at 9:00 AM PT on Kickstarter.

Early Bird Pricing (Limited Quantity):

Smart Home Starter Kit: $799 (retail: $1,332)

  • Central hub + 2 cameras + 4 sensors + 2 smart switches + thermostat integration
  • One app controls everything
  • AI learns your habits (no programming)
  • 15-30% energy savings guaranteed
  • No monthly fees

Only 500 early bird spots. After that, price increases to $999.

👉 Preview the Campaign

Set a reminder for February 15th, 9:00 AM PT so you don’t miss out.

— Alex
Founder, HeyZack

P.S. — Your non-tech partner will actually like this one. Promise.

CTA Button: Preview the Campaign

Email 2: Launch Reminder (T-1 Day)

Send Date: February 14, 2026 at 8:00 AM PT

Email 2A: VIP List (B2C Focus)

ElementContent
Subject ATomorrow at 8 AM: Your VIP hour starts
Subject BYou’re one of 500 getting early access tomorrow
PreheaderSet your alarm—early bird pricing sells out fast

Key Message:

  • 8:00 AM PT — VIP access goes live
  • 9:00 AM PT — Public launch (remaining 1,900+ waitlist members)
  • ~10:30 AM PT — Early bird tier likely sold out

CTA Button: Set My Reminder (calendar invite download)

Email 2B: VIP List (B2B Focus)

ElementContent
Subject ATomorrow 8 AM: Operator early access opens
Subject B200 beta slots available—tomorrow morning
PreheaderCommercial beta program opens in 24 hours

Key Message:

  • Essential Tier: $4,999/property (60% off $8,000 retail)
  • Professional Tier: $3,999/property (60% off $6,500 retail)
  • Limited to 200 operators total

CTA Button: Add to Calendar

Email 2C: Main List (B2C Focus)

ElementContent
Subject ATomorrow 9 AM: HeyZack launches
Subject B24 hours until early bird pricing goes live
Preheader500 early bird spots, 2,400 people waiting—set your alarm

Key Message:

  • 2,400+ people on waitlist
  • 500 early bird spots
  • First-come, first-served

CTA Button: Set Alarm for 9 AM PT (calendar invite)

Email 3: Final 12-Hour Reminder

Send Date: February 14, 2026 at 9:00 PM PT

ElementContent
SegmentAll segments
Subject12 hours until launch ⏰
PreheaderSetting your alarm now will save you $533 tomorrow

Body (Minimal/Urgent):

Tomorrow morning:

VIPs: 8:00 AM PT
Everyone else: 9:00 AM PT

Early bird: $799 (500 slots)
Regular: $999 (after early bird sells out)
Retail: $1,332 (after campaign)

Savings if you’re early: $533

Set your alarm now 👇

[Set Alarm for 8 AM PT - VIP] or [Set Alarm for 9 AM PT - Main]

— Alex

Launch Week Email Cadence

Campaign Duration: February 15 - March 30, 2026

Email Schedule Overview

DayEmailSend TimeSegmentPurpose
Day 1Launch Morning7:00/8:00 AM PTVIP/MainCampaign is LIVE
Day 1Launch Evening5:00 PM PTNon-backersScarcity update
Day 2Extension8:00 AM PTNon-backersTechnical issues addressed
Day 3Reason #28:00 AM PTNon-backersSpouse acceptance
Day 5Reason #1 + Press8:00 AM PTNon-backersPress coverage + energy savings
Day 7Week Wrap8:00 AM PTAllProgress + thank you
Day 10Social Proof8:00 AM PTNon-backersCommercial adoption story
Day 14Midpoint8:00 AM PTAllStretch goals

Day 1: Launch Morning

VIP Segment (7:00 AM PT)

ElementContent
Subject AWe’re live—VIP hour starts now
Subject BYour early access is active (one hour head start)
Preheader$799 early bird pricing—500 spots available

Body:

[First Name],

We’re live.

Your VIP hour started at 7:00 AM PT. You have until 8:00 AM before the public launch.

👉 Back HeyZack Now

Early Bird Starter Kit: $799 (40% off retail $1,332)
Limited to first 500 backers

✓ One app controls everything
✓ AI learns your habits
✓ 15-30% energy savings
✓ No monthly fees
✓ Ships June 2026

You’ve been waiting for this. Don’t let analysis paralysis cost you $533.

— Alex

CTA Button: Secure My Early Bird Spot

Main Segment (8:00 AM PT)

ElementContent
Subject AHeyZack is live on Kickstarter
Subject BWe just launched (early bird pricing active)
Preheader$799 for limited time—500 early bird spots available

CTA Button: Get Early Bird Pricing

Day 1: Launch Evening (5:00 PM PT)

ElementContent
SegmentAll non-backers
Subject AUpdate: 347 early bird spots left
Subject BEarly bird pricing selling faster than expected
PreheaderReal-time update on remaining availability

Body:

Quick update:

Early bird spots remaining: 347 of 500

We launched 10 hours ago. If the current pace holds, early bird sells out by tomorrow afternoon.

After 500, price increases to $999.

Current pricing: $799 (saves you $533 vs. retail)

👉 Secure Your Spot

Not trying to pressure you—just wanted you to have the real numbers.

— Alex

P.S. — Most common question today: “Does it really work with my existing Nest thermostat?” Yes. Full compatibility list on the campaign page.

CTA Button: Lock In $799 Pricing

Day 2: Extension Email (8:00 AM PT)

ElementContent
Subject AEarly bird extended through tonight (here’s why)
Subject B24-hour extension—what happened yesterday
PreheaderServer issues affected some backers, extending VIP pricing through 11:59 PM PT

Body:

[First Name],

Transparent update:

Yesterday during launch, Kickstarter’s servers had intermittent issues between 9:15-10:45 AM PT. Some of you got error messages when trying to back, and we received emails from frustrated supporters who couldn’t complete their pledges.

So we’re extending early bird pricing through tonight (11:59 PM PT, Feb 16).

Current spots remaining: 178 of 500

👉 Back at $799 (Until Midnight Tonight)

After tonight, we’re moving to regular backer pricing ($999) regardless of how many early bird slots remain.

— Alex

CTA Button: Claim Extended Early Bird

Day 3: Reason #2 (Spouse Acceptance)

ElementContent
Subject ATop reason #2: “My partner actually uses it”
Subject BWhy non-tech partners love HeyZack
PreheaderSpouse acceptance factor—the feature nobody talks about but everyone needs

Body:

[First Name],

We asked our beta testers: “What’s the #1 thing that surprised you about HeyZack?”

#2 most common answer: “My non-tech spouse/partner actually uses it without asking me for help.”

Tyler (Seattle) said: “My wife tried our old SmartThings setup exactly once, got frustrated with the interface, and never touched it again. I became the house IT guy. With HeyZack, she uses it daily—voice commands, the app, everything. That’s when I knew we’d built something different.”

Why this matters:

A smart home only works if everyone in the house can actually use it. If your partner hates it, you’ll end up turning it all off in six months.

We designed HeyZack for Tyler’s wife and Margaret—not for engineers.

Current tally: $347,000 raised from 612 backers in 2 days.

— Alex

CTA Button: Watch the Interface Demo

Day 5: Reason #1 + Press Coverage

ElementContent
Subject AThe Verge: “HeyZack actually delivers on smart home promises”
Subject BPress coverage + top reason to back
PreheaderTech media reviews are in—plus the #1 feature beta testers mention

Key Press Quotes:

  • The Verge: “HeyZack takes aim at smart home fragmentation… and actually delivers.”
  • Ars Technica: “The AI genuinely learns behavioral patterns—not just ‘if-then’ timers marketed as intelligence.”
  • TechCrunch: “Property managers get enterprise building management at 95% lower cost.”

Energy Savings Proof:

  • Before: $210/month average electric bill
  • After: $163/month average (first 6 months)
  • Annual savings: $564
  • Payback: 17 months

CTA Button: Back HeyZack Now

Day 7: Week Wrap

ElementContent
Subject AOne week in: $680K raised (thank you)
Subject BWeek 1 wrap-up + new shipping timeline
PreheaderCampaign progress, backer questions answered, and what’s next

Key Updates:

  • $680,000 raised from 1,247 backers (1,360% of goal)
  • Updated Shipping: First 500 backers ship June 2026

FAQ Highlights:

  1. “Can I add devices later?” → Yes, ecosystem scales with you
  2. “What if I already have a Nest thermostat?” → Integrates with it
  3. “How long does setup really take?” → Average 34 minutes

CTA Button: Join 1,247 Backers

Day 14: Midpoint Momentum

ElementContent
Subject AHalfway through the campaign: $1.1M raised
Subject B2 weeks in + new stretch goals announced
PreheaderCampaign midpoint update, stretch goals unlocked, manufacturing timeline

Stretch Goals:

  • $1M (Unlocked): Free upgraded hub for all backers
  • $1.5M: Free bonus door/window sensor 2-pack
  • $2M: Matter 1.2 certification (ahead of schedule)

CTA Button: Get Your System

Tone Evolution Guide

PhaseToneApproach
Day 1High urgency, directThey already know—minimal context needed
Day 2Transparent, trustworthyExtension justification builds trust
Day 3Emotional, relatableSpouse acceptance is human
Day 5Authoritative, validatedPress coverage = proof
Day 7Grateful, transparentMilestone celebration
Day 10Social proof, ethical FOMOReal operator story
Day 14Momentum, inclusiveEveryone wins together

Email Performance Targets

Pre-Launch Sequence

EmailExpected Open RateExpected Click Rate
Email 1 (VIP)45-55%15-25%
Email 1 (Main)35-45%15-25%
Email 2 (Reminder)55-65%25-35%
Email 3 (Final)60-70%35-50%

Conversion Targets

SegmentExpected Conversion
VIP Early Access60-70% (480-560 of 800)
Main List15-20% (240-320 of 1,600)
Total Early Bird720-880 backers

  "pre_launch": {
    "email_1": "2026-02-08T08:00:00-08:00",

}

CTA Button Text Reference

EmailPrimary CTASecondary CTA
Day 1 Morning (VIP)Secure My Early Bird Spot—
Day 1 Morning (Public)Get Early Bird Pricing—
Day 1 EveningLock In $799 PricingSee Campaign Page
Day 2 ExtensionClaim Extended Early Bird—
Day 3 Reason #2Watch the Interface DemoBack HeyZack Now
Day 5 Reason #1Back HeyZack NowSee Beta Results
Day 7 Week WrapJoin 1,247 BackersSee Shipping Timeline
Day 14 MidpointGet Your SystemSee Stretch Goals
